title: Command Packaging, Build Identity, Cross-Platform Behavior, and Distribution · Runtime Recall
summary: A delayed ranger review reconstructs command packaging, build identity, cross-platform behavior, and distribution from revision, command, arguments, request identity, response fixture, state transition, cache decision, goroutine ownership, output, failure, cleanup, and recovery evidence. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for reproducible cross-platform Go Pokedex artifact after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causa…
objectives: Keep cmd entrypoint thin, internal packages directional, fixtures separate, and runtime paths independent of source checkout.
Expose semantic version, revision, build time policy, Go version, platform, and dirty-state evidence without making builds unnecessarily nondeterministic.
Test path, newline, signal, terminal, rename, permission, and architecture assumptions on supported platforms and document differences.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

Competency probe: Document install, data location, upgrade compatibility, rollback, backup, uninstall, and support without deleting user collections silently.

For Pokedex product engineering and Go Record what required effort · Review Pokedex Go Install Upgrade…, challenge the documented misconception with runtime, failure, race, or toolchain evidence: Replacing the binary is the complete upgrade and rollback plan.
